Details: The first publicly available version of the API

Resources.Name: Attendee
Resources.Description: An `Attendee` is a person registered for a signup.

Attributes.Name: complete
Attributes.Description:
Whether or not attendee has completed all necessary items (personal information, questions, forms, add ons).


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: active
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the attendee is active.

Attributes.Name: canceled
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the attendee is canceled.

Attributes.Name: waitlisted
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the attendee is waitlisted.

Attributes.Name: waitlisted_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the attendee was waitlisted.

Resources.Name: Campus
Resources.Description: A `Campus` is a location belonging to an Organization.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the campus.

Attributes.Name: street
Attributes.Description: Street address of the campus.

Attributes.Name: city
Attributes.Description: City where the campus is located.

Attributes.Name: state
Attributes.Description: State or province where the campus is located.

Attributes.Name: zip
Attributes.Description: Zip code of the campus.

Attributes.Name: country
Attributes.Description: Country where the campus is located.

Resources.Name: Category
Resources.Description: A `Category` is a label used to group together and find signups more easily.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the category.

Resources.Name: EmergencyContact
Resources.Description: `Emergency_Contact` is the person assigned as the emergency contact for an attendee.

Attributes.Name: phone_number
Attributes.Description: Phone number of the emergency contact person.

Resources.Name: Organization
Resources.Description: The root level `Organization` record which serves as a link to `Signup`s.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the Organization.

Resources.Name: SelectionType
Resources.Description: `Selection_Types` are used to present the options people register for in a signup.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the selection type.

Attributes.Name: publicly_available
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the selection type is available to the public.

Attributes.Name: price_cents
Attributes.Description: Price of selection type in cents.

Attributes.Name: price_currency
Attributes.Description:
Signup currency code, example `"USD"`.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: price_currency_symbol
Attributes.Description:
Signup currency symbol, example `"$"`.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: price_formatted
Attributes.Description:
Price of selection type with currency formatting (symbol not included).


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Resources.Name: Signup
Resources.Description: A `Signup` is an organization signup that people can register for.

Attributes.Name: archived
Attributes.Description: Whether the signup is archived or not.

Attributes.Name: close_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which regsitration closes.

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: Decription of the signup.

Attributes.Name: logo_url
Attributes.Description: URL for the image used for the signup.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the signup.

Attributes.Name: new_registration_url
Attributes.Description: URL to allow people to register for signup.

Attributes.Name: open_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which regsitration opens.

Resources.Name: SignupLocation
Resources.Description: `Signup_location` is the location of a signup.

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the signup location.

Attributes.Name: address_data
Attributes.Description:
The address data of the signup location, which includes details like street, city, state, and postal code.


Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: subpremise
Attributes.Description: The subpremise of the signup location, such as an building or room number.

Attributes.Name: latitude
Attributes.Description: The latitude of the signup location.

Attributes.Name: longitude
Attributes.Description: The longitude of the signup location.

Attributes.Name: location_type
Attributes.Description: The type of location, such as `address`, `coords`, or `online`.

Attributes.Name: url
Attributes.Description: The URL for the signup location, if applicable (e.g., for online events).

Attributes.Name: formatted_address
Attributes.Description: The formatted address of the signup location, which may not include subpremise details.

Attributes.Name: full_formatted_address
Attributes.Description: The fully formatted address of the signup location, including subpremise details.

Resources.Name: SignupTime
Resources.Description: `Signup_time`s are associated with a signup, which can have multiple signup times.

Attributes.Name: starts_at
Attributes.Description: Start date and time of signup time.

Attributes.Name: ends_at
Attributes.Description: End date and time of signup time.

Attributes.Name: all_day
Attributes.Description: Whether or not the signup time is all day.
